# What is this?
 a mod that i made to add litte more fun and WILD to the game. it currently already have some wild thing in it such as:
 - a  harden stick to craft a harden harden stick thats has crazy attack speed, giving the sticks more valuable
 - a rng based enchant thats have 1% of putting a entity on fire sooo long thats it's surely going to die (most of them)(lv2)
##  why it's so boring 
 maybe because i have not added much,or baecause u think those fun thing ain't fun(i'm aslo).
 just wait me update the mod.
##  will i keep updating the mod or stop updating like the others small mod in the future ?
 idk,i don't see the future like Baba Vanga (if u don't know search google)
